Refer to Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - Chart "E LO 2".
The following bearing and range information obtained from HONILEY (HON) VOR/DME (52°21´N, 001°40´W) is given:

Radial: 034°
Range: 44 NM

Find the current position of the aircraft (note: slant range corrections should be ignored)..
